const {useState,useEffect,useRef,useMemo,useCallback,createContext,useContext}=React;

/* ═══ UTILS ═══ */
const uid=()=>Date.now().toString(36)+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,6);
const tok=()=>Array.from({length:16},()=>'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789'[Math.floor(Math.random()*36)]).join('');
const fmt=d=>d?new Date(d).toLocaleDateString('en-IN',{day:'numeric',month:'short',year:'numeric'}):'—';
const ago=ts=>{const d=Date.now()-new Date(ts);if(d<60000)return'just now';if(d<3600000)return`${Math.floor(d/60000)}m ago`;if(d<86400000)return`${Math.floor(d/3600000)}h ago`;return`${Math.floor(d/86400000)}d ago`;};
const initials=n=>(n||'C').split(' ').map(w=>w[0]).join('').slice(0,2).toUpperCase();
const curr=n=>`₹${(n||0).toLocaleString('en-IN')}`;
const clamp=(n,min,max)=>Math.min(Math.max(n,min),max);
const fmtFull=d=>d?new Date(d).toLocaleDateString('en-IN',{day:'numeric',month:'long',year:'numeric',hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'}):'—';
const pct=(a,b)=>b===0?0:Math.round(a/b*100);
const daysBetween=(a,b)=>Math.ceil((new Date(b)-new Date(a))/(1000*60*60*24));
const isOverdue=d=>d&&new Date(d)<new Date();
const isUpcoming=(d,days=3)=>{if(!d)return false;const diff=(new Date(d)-new Date())/(1000*60*60*24);return diff>=0&&diff<=days;};
const groupBy=(arr,fn)=>arr.reduce((m,x)=>{const k=fn(x);(m[k]=m[k]||[]).push(x);return m;},{});
const copyText=t=>{navigator.clipboard?.writeText(t);};
const downloadJSON=(data,name)=>{const b=new Blob([JSON.stringify(data,null,2)],{type:'application/json'});const a=document.createElement('a');a.href=URL.createObjectURL(b);a.download=name;a.click();};
const exportCSV=(rows,cols,name)=>{const csv=[cols.join(','),...rows.map(r=>cols.map(c=>JSON.stringify(r[c]??'')).join(','))].join('\n');const b=new Blob([csv],{type:'text/csv'});const a=document.createElement('a');a.href=URL.createObjectURL(b);a.download=name;a.click();};
const ensureArr=v=>Array.isArray(v)?v:[];
const getInvoiceTotal=inv=>Number(inv?.totalWithGst||inv?.amount||0);
const getInvoicePaidAmount=inv=>ensureArr(inv?.payments).reduce((a,p)=>a+(parseFloat(p.amount)||0),0);
const getInvoiceBalance=inv=>Math.max(0,getInvoiceTotal(inv)-getInvoicePaidAmount(inv));
/* ═══ PDF GENERATION (pure HTML — no external libraries) ═══ */
const LOGO_B64='data:image/png;base64,';
const COMPANY={name:'Crixy Ai',tagline:'Your Digital Growth Partner',phone:'+91 8962890425',email:'info@crixyai.com',website:'crixyai.com'};
